name: umg-envoy-agent
description: Minimized public alpha.6 UMG Envoy Agent for OpenClaw

scripts.umg:public-surface:smoke: node -e "import('./dist/plugin-entry-public.js').then(async (m) => { const entry = m.default; const tools = []; entry.register({ registerTool(def) { tools.push(def.name); } }, {}); const expected = ['umg_envoy_status','umg_envoy_library_status','umg_envoy_library_search','umg_envoy_runtime_spec_dry_run','umg_envoy_runtime_visibility_header','umg_envoy_runtime_molt_map','umg_envoy_runtime_dashboard','umg_envoy_runtime_ir_matrix','umg_envoy_runtime_inspect','umg_envoy_local_readonly_plan','umg_envoy_local_readonly_scan','umg_envoy_alpha_demo','umg_envoy_sleeve_list','umg_envoy_sleeve_inspect','umg_envoy_sleeve_demo']; const missing = expected.filter(x => !tools.includes(x)); const extra = tools.filter(x => !expected.includes(x)); if (missing.length || extra.length) { console.error(JSON.stringify({ok:false, tools, missing, extra}, null, 2)); process.exit(1); } console.log(JSON.stringify({ok:true, tools}, null, 2)); })"
scripts.umg:alpha-demo:smoke: node -e "import('./dist/plugin-entry-public.js').then(async (m) => { const entry = m.default; const defs = []; entry.register({ registerTool(def) { defs.push(def); } }, {}); const alpha = defs.find(d => d.name === 'umg_envoy_alpha_demo'); if (!alpha) { throw new Error('umg_envoy_alpha_demo missing'); } const result = await alpha.execute({ message: 'Give me a concise demo', sleeveId: 'public-basic-envoy' }); console.log(result.content[0].text); const parsed = JSON.parse(result.content[0].text); if (!parsed.ok) process.exit(1); })"
scripts.umg:operational-sleeve:smoke: node -e "import('./dist/plugin-entry-public.js').then(async (m) => { const entry = m.default; const defs = []; entry.register({ registerTool(def) { defs.push(def); } }, {}); const inspect = defs.find(d => d.name === 'umg_envoy_sleeve_inspect'); if (!inspect) { throw new Error('umg_envoy_sleeve_inspect missing'); } const result = await inspect.execute({ sleeveId: 'public-basic-envoy' }); console.log(result.content[0].text); const parsed = JSON.parse(result.content[0].text); if (!parsed.ok) process.exit(1); })"
